goals.primary: Provide a minimal command-line TODO list manager written in Go
secondary: Persist items to a local JSON file at ~/.todo_cli/items.json

non_goals: No cloud sync or remote storage
inferred_vision.source_summary: A 4-file Go CLI package implementing a local JSON-backed TODO manager. Entry point is main.go; business logic in cmd/; persistence in storage/ with atomic write via rename.
